'''Unit B-6''' was the name of a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-operated [[Medcenter/Legends|medical center]] located in the [[Tammuz-an capital city|capital city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]].

==History==
[[Freighter/Legends|Freighter]] pilot [[Jessica Meade]] was once brought here after suffering several cracked ribs following an altercation with the space pirate, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]].

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|The New King}}
